$comment: Body-text patterns for the heading-demotion heuristic. Override via config.heuristicsPath. Patterns are JS regex source (no flags, no anchors — anchoring/case-sensitivity baked in by fix.js).
$comment_bodyVerbSuffixes: Strong body-text signals only. Pure particles (的/对/和/与/或/而/但/来) and prepositions (从/到/向/跟) appear in legit headings (e.g. '更高的视角', '从生到死') and were removed to avoid false demotion.
